{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Heartguard Chest
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Heartguard Chest]] is a spiritual object and treasure plundered from an ancient clan of [[Soulsmiths]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
